name: Q&A Story Template
description: Interactive Q&A story using Instagram's question sticker. Used for player Q&As, fan questions, or AMA sessions with staff and players.

topic_hint.example: Football, life in Zagreb, matchday rituals...

guidelines: Player photo as background with the question sticker zone clearly designated in the lower third. Headline at the top introduces the Q&A session. Include the player name and a prompt encouraging questions. For answer stories, display the question sticker response above the player's video/text answer. Ensure sticker zone does not overlap with IG UI elements.
